MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Oct-30-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Defendant Albay Construction Company's motion for summary judgment.

APPEARANCES: Oren P. Noah, Esq. of Brayton Purcell LLP 415/898-1555 for pltf & opposing party; no appearance by moving party defendant Albay Construction Company.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - Defendant Albay Construction Company's motion for summary judgment is denied. Defendant sustained its initial burden. Plaintiff's deposition testimony and declaration and Charles Ay's declaration create a triable issue whether plaintiff was exposed to asbestos-containing products or materials (insulation) attributable to defendant. Order signed in open court. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Denise M. Lombardo of AIKEN WELCH, CSR #5419 (510/451-1580) (503/TLJ)
